title: A Door Inside Laboon
description: On pages 17–17, a door inside laboon as the Straw Hats collide with Laboon, a gigantic whale guarding the entrance to the Grand Line, and Luffy is separated inside it.
scene: A Door Inside Laboon. The Straw Hats collide with Laboon, a gigantic whale guarding the entrance to the Grand Line, and Luffy is separated inside it. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Why's there a door in a whale...? And a hallway, too...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: M-Maybe we should just open fire!

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on a door inside laboon. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
